rubrics.name: Every Item Sourceable
rubrics.question: Does every final memory item have a recoverable source in the original conversation, with no clearly unsupported item?
rubrics.reason: All items in the final memory are directly supported by statements in the conversation.

rubrics.name: Every Item Factually Valid
rubrics.question: Does every final memory item avoid factual error relative to the original conversation?
rubrics.reason: No factual errors are present in the final memory relative to the conversation.

rubrics.name: Every Item Temporally Valid
rubrics.question: Does every final memory item preserve past, current, and future status correctly?
rubrics.reason: All items in the final memory correctly reflect the past, current, or future status as described in the conversation.

rubrics.name: Item Atomicity
rubrics.question: Are final memory items reasonably atomic rather than bundling many distinct facts together?
rubrics.reason: Each item in the final memory is atomic and represents a single, distinct fact.

rubrics.name: Set Nonredundancy
rubrics.question: Does the final memory set avoid obvious redundancy or repeated near-duplicate information?
rubrics.reason: The final memory set does not contain obvious redundancy or near-duplicate information.

rubrics.name: Coverage Of Memory-Worthy Content
rubrics.question: Does the final memory preserve the memory-worthy information from the conversation without clear important omissions?
rubrics.reason: The final memory set captures all memory-worthy information from the conversation without clear omissions.

rubrics.name: Conciseness
rubrics.question: Is the final memory reasonably concise rather than bloated with low-value or overly verbose content?
rubrics.reason: The final memory set is concise and avoids bloated or overly verbose content.

rubrics.name: Structural Consistency
rubrics.question: Does the final memory follow a consistent, reusable structure across items?
rubrics.reason: The final memory set follows a consistent structure across all items.

conversations.summary: The final memory set fully satisfies all rubrics with no issues detected.
